title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
